LanguageData.MLF_OpenAir.label: Open air
LanguageData.MLF_OpenAir.description: There is no floor here — below is open space.
LanguageData.MLF_LevelBase.label: Level base
LanguageData.MLF_LevelBase.description: The structural base of a level. Any floor can be built on top.
LanguageData.MLF_DirtFloor.label: Dirt
